languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

languages.text: "Я чувствую смятение вокруг. Будто на огромный холст выплеснули полный флакон краски. Это из-за Патента, знаю. Но к чему такое волнение? Разве сама кровь Вольного Торговца не священна?"

"I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

"I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

languages.text: 「混乱が渦巻いているのがわかります。まるで巨大なキャンバスに絵の具の入った瓶がぶち破られたかのように。ウォラントのせいなのはわかっています。でも、なぜ騒ぎになっているのか。ローグトレーダーの血は神聖なはずなのに」
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

traits.locale_text: 「混乱が渦巻いているのがわかる。まるで巨大なキャンバスに絵の具の入った瓶がぶち破られたかのように。ウォラントのせいなのはわかっている。でも、なぜ騒ぎになっているのか。ローグトレーダーの血は神聖なはずなのに。」

languages.text: « Je sens la confusion tout autour de moi, comme si on avait renversé un pot de peinture sur une immense toile. C'est à cause de la lettre de marque, je le sais, mais pourquoi tant d'agitation ? Le sang {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} n'est-il pas sacré ? »
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

traits.locale_text: « Je sens la confusion tout autour de moi, comme si on avait renversé un pot de peinture sur une immense toile. C'est à cause de la lettre de marque, je le sais, mais pourquoi tant d'agitation ? Le sang {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} n'est-il pas sacré ? »

languages.text: "Ich kann die Verwirrung um mich herum spüren. Es ist, als wäre ein Eimer Farbe über einer riesigen Leinwand ausgegossen worden. Es geht um den Handelsbrief. Ich weiß. Aber warum die Aufregung? Ist nicht allein schon das Blut {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} heilig?"
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann die Verwirrung um mich herum spüren. Es ist, als wäre ein Eimer Farbe über einer riesigen Leinwand ausgegossen worden. Es geht um den Handelsbrief. Ich weiß. Aber warum die Aufregung? Ist nicht allein schon das Blut {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} heilig?"

languages.text: "Etrafımdaki kafa karışıklığını hissedebiliyorum. Sanki dolu bir boya şişesi, devasa bir tuvale sıçratılmış gibi. Ruhsatname yüzünden, biliyorum. Fakat bu kargaşa neden? Hür Tacir'in kanı da kutsal değil midir?"
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

traits.locale_text: "Etrafımdaki kafa karışıklığını hissedebiliyorum. Sanki dolu bir boya şişesi, devasa bir tuvale sıçratılmış gibi. Ruhsatname yüzünden, biliyorum. Fakat bu kargaşa neden? Hür Tacir'in kanı da kutsal değil midir?"

languages.text: «Percibo confusión a mi alrededor. Es como si se hubiese arrojado un bote entero de pintura contra un lienzo enorme. Sé que el motivo es la Patente, pero ¿a qué se debe la conmoción? ¿No es acaso sagrado de por sí el linaje {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente?».
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"

traits.locale_text: «Percibo confusión a mi alrededor. Es como si se hubiese arrojado un bote entero de pintura contra un lienzo enorme. Sé que el motivo es la Patente, pero ¿a qué se debe la conmoción? ¿No es acaso sagrado de por sí el linaje {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente?».

languages.text: “我能感知到四周弥漫的困惑，如同整瓶颜料泼洒在巨幅画布上。我知道，这都是因为那份贸易授状。但为何会引发如此骚动？难道行商浪人本身的血脉还不够神圣么？”
languages.original_text: "I can sense the confusion all around me. It is as if a full bottle of paint has been splashed onto a huge canvas. It's because of Warrant, I know. But why the commotion? Isn't the very blood of the Rogue Trader sacred?"
